name: Dinomist Stegosaur
name_jp: ダイナミスト・ステゴサウラー
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
If another "Dinomist" card(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect, you can destroy this card instead.

[ Monster Effect ] 
If another Pendulum Monster you control battles an opponent's monster, after damage calculation: You can destroy those monsters.
pend_eff: If another "Dinomist" card(s) you control would be destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect, you can destroy this card instead.
mnst_eff: If another Pendulum Monster you control battles an opponent's monster, after damage calculation: You can destroy those monsters.
eff: If another Pendulum Monster you control battles an opponent's monster, after damage calculation: You can destroy those monsters.

mst: Destroys battling monster after damage calculation
